Use the character from the reference image; IGNORE the flat magenta reference background. In the crowd at a slave auction, harsh midday light, other bidders around him rendered as dark anonymous silhouettes: the rich nobleman from the reference — soft doughy pampered face, silk-and-fur-trimmed robes in deep blue and gold, jeweled rings — with one hand RAISED HIGH mid-bid, mouth open calling a price, imperious. Behind him stand two heavyset scarred bodyguards with plain dark iron slave collars, faces impassive. At his side KNEELS a frail, gaunt, weary young woman in a plain threadbare shift, also collared, eyes downcast, motionless — rendered with restraint: no wounds, no gore, just frailty, stillness and lowered eyes. She is small in the composition but clearly visible. The contrast between his opulence and her worn condition is the entire point of the image.
